title: galeorchis spathulata
intro: Galeorchis spathulata, also known as the spotted galeorchis, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Galeorchis spathulata are often dried and processed into powders or decoctions for use in traditional medicine.
